# kCTFontManagerErrorFontURLsKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontManagerErrorFontURLsKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagererrorfonturlskey)

-  kCTFontManagerErrorFontURLsKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontManagerErrorFontURLsKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontManagerErrorFontURLsKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagererrorfonturlskey#Discussion)

User info key to be used with CFError references returned from registration functions. The value associated with this key in the user info dictionary of a CFError object is a CFArray of font URLs that failed with the given error.
